description_long: This sconce features a sleek, elongated conical body that tapers smoothly from a wide base to a narrow top, suspended from a thin, straight rod. The rod connects to a flat, circular mounting plate at the top, which likely attaches to a ceiling or overhead surface. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform, metallic finish that gives it a contemporary appearance. The fixture appears to house a single light source at the top, shielded by the mounting plate, which may also serve as a reflector. The surface is smooth and likely made of metal, contributing to its modern aesthetic. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing function and simplicity.
description: A modern, conical sconce with a smooth metallic finish, suspended from a thin rod and topped with a flat circular mounting plate. The design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen directly from the side, showing the full length of the conical body and the straight rod leading to the circular mounting plate.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, with the same side profile of the conical body and mounting plate visible.
description_view_2: The sconce is again shown from the side, with no significant features differing from the other views due to its symmetrical design.
description_view_3: This view matches the previous ones, displaying the same elongated conical form and minimalistic mounting plate.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with a smooth conical body and a simple, unadorned mounting plate. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize contemporary style.
